_comment: Real-shape mcp-proxy /call response for openagentic_admin.admin_system_redis_health_check, DEGRADED case. Mirrors the exception path in services/mcps/oap-admin-mcp/src/admin_mcp_server/server.py lines 588-593 where redis.ping() raises (connection refused, timeout, auth failure, etc.). Used by the degraded-case test to verify the analyze transform classifies the service as 'unhealthy' and the LLM narrative + report explicitly flag Redis as down. Note: success=false; healthy=false; message carries the exception text.

content.text: {"success": false, "healthy": false, "message": "Redis connection failed: Error 111 connecting to redis-master.agentic-dev.svc.cluster.local:6379. Connection refused."}
